infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Capture weekly progress photos. Photos are stored on-device only and never uploaded.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Attach a progress photo. Photos stay on-device and are never uploaded.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Read steps, active energy, resting heart rate, sleep and workouts (e.g. synced from Garmin Connect) to enrich your log.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: LEAN.SYS does not write to Health.

plugins.photosPermission: Attach a progress photo. Photos stay on-device and are never uploaded.
